name: Crafty Plus Case
summary: The Crafty Plus Case offers optimal protection for your Crafty and Crafty+ vaporiser, making it an ideal choice for portable use.
description: The Crafty Plus Case offers optimal protection for your Crafty and Crafty+ vaporiser, making it an ideal choice for portable use. Its durable exterior provides superior defence against everyday wear and tear, such as bumps and scratches. With its odour-proof design, your device will remain free from any unwanted scents while in transit. Additionally, this sleek travel case offers ample space for accessories without taking up too much room during travel or storage. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
